import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { NotFoundPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <NotFoundPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

Page not found — a plain-language explanation plus a way forward
(search, links home and to all services), never a dead end and never the
raw word "404" in citizen-facing text.

```tsx
import { NotFoundPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<NotFoundPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={[{ code: 'en', label: 'English' }]}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  onSearch={(query) => { /* … */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Render this for any broken or moved URL. The host application is
responsible for returning the actual HTTP `404` status; this component
only renders the page body.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`, the standard `Header`/`Footer` chrome, and a skip link, like
  every ETHDS template.
- The search field and "try instead" links give the citizen a real next
  step rather than a dead end.
- All text is a `labels` prop with English defaults, overridable per
  locale.

## Plain HTML

Templates are mostly composition — chrome plus a couple of already-documented
components. Here that's [Header](/docs/components/header),
[Search](/docs/components/search), and [Footer](/docs/components/footer),
each with its own Plain HTML section.

```html
<a href="#main" class="ethds-skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

<header class="ethds-header">
  <div class="ethds-header__bar">
    <a href="/" class="ethds-header__identity" aria-label="Government of Ethiopia — home">
      <span class="ethds-header__service-name">Government of Ethiopia</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</header>

<main id="main" class="ethds-container">
  <h1>Page not found</h1>
  <p>We couldn't find that page. It may have moved, or the address may be wrong.</p>

  <form role="search" class="ethds-search">
    <label for="q" class="ethds-visually-hidden">Search government services</label>
    <input id="q" name="q" type="search" inputmode="search" class="ethds-search__input" />
    <button type="submit" class="ethds-search__submit">Search</button>
  </form>

  <h2>Try instead:</h2>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="/" class="ethds-link">Government home</a></li>
    <li><a href="/services" class="ethds-link">All services</a></li>
  </ul>
</main>

<footer class="ethds-footer" aria-label="Footer">
  <p>© 2026 Government of Ethiopia.</p>
</footer>
```

The host application is responsible for returning the actual HTTP `404`
status alongside this markup — that responsibility doesn't change with
the framework serving it.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `homeHref` | `string` (default `'/'`) | No |
| `servicesHref` | `string` (default `'/services'`) | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onSearch` | `(query: string) => void` | No |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<NotFoundPageLabels>` | No |
